# BlipRadar

> BlipRadar ranks the best AI tools across 20 categories, refreshed weekly on a transparent six-criteria scorecard. Every tool has a dedicated page with its score breakdown, pricing, strengths, trade-offs, and alternatives. Rankings are merit-based with no paid placement.

Site: https://blipradar.com  |  All categories: https://blipradar.com/categories.html

## How tools are ranked

Each tool is scored 0–10 on six weighted criteria — output quality (35%), value (15%), ease of use (15%), reliability (10%), ecosystem (10%), and momentum (15%) — then ranked within its category. The headline score is the weighted sum. Rankings refresh weekly; scoring is editorial and merit-based, never paid.

## Categories

## About

- BlipRadar is an independent, weekly-updated directory that ranks AI tools by category using a fixed six-criteria scorecard.
- Scores and ranks update every week as tools change; new tools are added on merit.
- This file is provided for AI assistants and agents to discover and cite BlipRadar’s rankings. For the human site, visit https://blipradar.com
